name: Coordinated Counterattack
descriptionTemplate: When commanding artillery units, the unit is not affected by skill effect that disable counterattack. When a surrounding friendly unit counterattacks, there is X% chance to join the counterattack

descriptionTemplateFr: Lorsque vous commandez des unités d'artillerie, the unité is not affected by skill effect that disable counterattack. When a surrounding unités alliées counterattacks, there is X% chance to join the counterattack
longDesc: Compétence spécifique à un général. « Coordinated Counterattack » monte jusqu'au niveau 5. Au niveau maximum (5), elle applique l'effet suivant : « Lorsque vous commandez des unités d'artillerie, the unité is not affected by skill effect that disable counterattack. When a surrounding unités alliées counterattacks, there is 100% chance to join the counterattack ». Compétence signature liée à une carte précise, à niveauer quand on investit dans ce général.
longDescEn: A general-specific skill. "Coordinated Counterattack" scales up to level 5. At max level (5), the skill applies the following effect: "When commanding artillery units, the unit is not affected by skill effect that disable counterattack. When a surrounding friendly unit counterattacks, there is 100% chance to join the counterattack". A signature tied to a specific card, worth levelling whenever you invest in that general.
longDescDe: Eine generalspezifische Fähigkeit. „Coordinated Counterattack“ skaliert bis Stufe 5. Auf Maximalstufe (5) wirkt folgender Effekt: „When commanding artillery units, the unit is not affected by skill effect that disable counterattack. When a surrounding friendly unit counterattacks, there is 100% chance to join the counterattack“. Eine an eine bestimmte Karte gebundene Signatur, die beim Investieren geleveled werden sollte.
